import numpy as np, os, json, subprocess
# Create a tiny test
os.makedirs('/tmp/testdata', exist_ok=True)
val = np.load('/data/val_data.npy')[:20].astype(np.float32)
# Build test_inputs of shape [N, 3, 2, 32, 64]
N = val.shape[0] - 2
inps = np.stack([val[i:i+3] for i in range(N)], 0)
np.save('/tmp/testdata/test_inputs.npy', inps)
import shutil
shutil.copy('/data/norm_stats.json', '/tmp/testdata/norm_stats.json')
shutil.copy('/data/lat.npy', '/tmp/testdata/lat.npy')
print('test_inputs shape', inps.shape)
